title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 105.360 - Nonapproval or termination of plan — hearing
text:
105.360.  Nonapproval or termination of plan — hearing. — The state agency shall not finally refuse to approve a plan without reasonable notice and opportunity for hearing to each political subdivision or instrumentality affected thereby.
(L. 1951 p. 788 § 5, A.L. 1985 H.B. 640) 
Effective 6-25-85
